compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Systemair RVK 125 A1, Vents TT 125, Blauberg Turbo 125
compatible_devices.notes: Controls fan speed via triac (5A fuse, 12A triac). Compatible with any 230V AC single-phase induction motor fan. Supports up to 2 fans. EC fans requiring 0-10V or PWM control are NOT compatible. Min fan speed adjustable 10-100% in 2% increments.
Triac-based Schuko outlet can power AC circulation fans. Total combined load across all outlets must not exceed 5A fuse rating. Only works with AC motor fans, not EC/PWM circulation fans.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: TechGrow Temp/RH Sensor, TechGrow Temp probe
compatible_devices.notes: Has 3x UTP (RJ45) sensor ports. Compatible with TechGrow Temp/RH Sensor and Temp probe. S-4, S-2, and S-Eco CO2 sensors are explicitly NOT compatible with the Clima Micro Plus.
